spec_match.rationale: Flawless mapping of spec IDL validation boundaries, executing both valid right-angles and invalid degrees (45, -90, 360, 1) natively.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive playground that automatically runs a diagnostic suite on load and lets users test arbitrary custom integer inputs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Frames the IDL type checks of the new specification accurately.

edge_cases.rationale: Robustly models edge cases like undefined and string arguments, showing active readback outputs to reflect system support.

references.rationale: Includes valid specifications and ChromeStatus entry links.

design_system.rationale: Adheres nicely to design patterns and borders.

summary: An excellent developer-focused diagnostic playground that validates the exact IDL type constraints of the new VideoFrameInit.rotation parameter. It executes native tests on load and offers high-fidelity edge-case debugging.
